mockCodexResult.summary: A nullable lyric path can throw before the API returns a controlled error.
mockCodexResult.rootCause: The controller assumes a lyric exists for every song.
mockCodexResult.discordReply: 원인은 song detail 조회에서 lyric null을 방어하지 못한 것입니다. 작은 null guard PR로 처리합니다.

prPlan.title: Fix Sentry lyric null guard
prPlan.implementationPrompt: Inspect SongController.getSong and add the narrowest null guard or controlled error for missing lyric. Do not refactor unrelated song flow.
testPlan: Run targeted backend test if one exists
If no narrow test exists, document not run
